feed.title: Howl Street — Your Wolf of Wall Street
feed.subtitle: They howl for themselves. We howl for you. No-BS finance signals from 100+ sources.

entry.title: [LOUDEST HOWL] Heavy blow for oil exporting groups! UAE to exit OPEC, OPEC+ amid Strait of Hormuz disruptions: What it means #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries or OPEC is a group of major oil-producing nations. This group coordinates their petroleum production policies to help effectively manage global oil supply and influence crude prices.

entry.title: Peso sinks past 61 vs $1, a new record low #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — The Philippine peso fell to a fresh record low on Tuesday, breaching the 61-per-dollar level for the first time as a broadly stronger US dollar weighed on Asian currencies during a packed week of central bank meetings, including a Federal Reserve decision clouded by uncertainty over the Middle East conflict. The local

entry.title: AboitizPower Q1 earnings surged 71% #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Aboitiz Power Corp. started 2026 with a profit surge of 71 percent thanks to strong capacity buildout. The company said in a disclosure on Tuesday its net income rose to P7.9 billion from P4.6 billion a year earlier. The firm’s beneficial earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization also jumped by 35

entry.title: WHERE TO INVEST: Market darlings wobble: Afrimat and Clicks stumble as Capitec retains premium investor love #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Investor sentiment is shifting as Afrimat and Clicks face pressure from setbacks and valuation strain, while Capitec continues to defy gravity, highlighting how quickly market favourites can fall from grace.

entry.title: Capitol Federal Financial declares $0.085 quarterly dividend #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Capitol Federal Financial declares $0.085 quarterly dividend

entry.title: UK Borrowing Costs Hit Highest Since 2008 as Oil Tops $111 #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The government’s borrowing costs have risen to their joint highest level since the 2008 financial crisis, after a sharp jump in the oil price prompted a sell-off in UK debt because of concerns over inflation. The yield on the 10-year gilt – the main benchmark for any government’s long-term ability to borrow – climbed back above five per cent for only the third time since the Iran war broke out on Tuesday, laying bare the extent to which Britain is almost uniquely exposed to the ongoing energy shock. The UK’s government…

entry.title: Elon Musk set for major SpaceX payday #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The pay package, which received approval in January, would grant Musk a whopping 200 million super-voting restricted shares of stock – as long as the colony is permanent, has at least one million residents, and SpaceX has hit a market valuation of $7.5 trillion.

entry.title: CAPITOL FEDERAL FINANCIAL, INC.® ANNOUNCES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND AND STOCK BUYBACK UPDATE #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: TOPEKA, Kan., April 28, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Capitol Federal Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: CFFN) (the "Company") announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.085 per share on outstanding CFFN common stock. The dividend is payable on May 15, 2026 to...

entry.title: Bitwise CIO says Strategy’s STRC could keep fueling Bitcoin’s latest rally #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan says Strategys STRC issuance has fueled Bitcoins rally and may support more BTC purchases. The post Bitwise CIO says Strategy’s STRC could keep fueling Bitcoin’s latest rally appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: Herzog’s legal advisor opens plea deal talks in Netanyahu corruption trial #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The initiation of plea deal talks could significantly impact political stability and market dynamics, highlighting the volatility of legal proceedings. The post Herzog’s legal advisor opens plea deal talks in Netanyahu corruption trial appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: Garry Marr: Are young FHSA savers about to get duped again? #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: First-home buyers weigh collapsing that tax shelter, with its likely stock gains compared with a tepid housing market

entry.title: MRF 2026 Resource Limited Partnership Closes IPO #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: TORONTO, April 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) — Middlefield, on behalf of MRF 2026 Resource Limited Partnership (“MRF 2026” or the “Partnership”), is pleased to announce that it has completed the final closing of the initial public offering of MRF 2026 Class A and Class F units for total gross proceeds of $38.2 million. The objectives […]

entry.title: Sebi offers a way over FPI tax rule hurdle #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: In a bid to streamline tax compliance, India's markets regulator Sebi is actively negotiating with the CBDT, the country’s tax authority. The proposal on the table suggests that foreign portfolio investors (FPIs) should have the autonomy to designate authorized signatories.

entry.title: Israel extends state of emergency to May 7 amid Lebanon shelling #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The state of emergency extension underscores the persistent volatility in the region, highlighting the need for diplomatic solutions. The post Israel extends state of emergency to May 7 amid Lebanon shelling appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: GM expects a whopping $500M tariff refund after Supreme Court strikes down levies #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: GM anticipates paying $2.5 billion to $3.5 billion in tariff costs for 2026, the company said Tuesday, down from an original estimate of $3 billion to $4 billion.

entry.title: This Boring but Beautiful Dividend Stock Could Quietly Help Fund Your Retirement for Decades. #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: It has one of the longest dividend-raise streaks on the market.

entry.title: The 95% Club: Why Nearly Every American Stopped Trading Their 401(k) #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The image of the retail day trader hunched over four monitors, scalping options between Slack messages, has dominated financial media since the meme stock era. The reality inside the average 401(k) plan looks nothing like that. According to Vanguard’s 2025 How America Saves report, only 5% of nonadvised participants made any portfolio exchanges in 2024, ... The 95% Club: Why Nearly Every American Stopped Trading Their 401(k)

entry.title: Jamie Dimon warns of 'some kind of bond crisis' ahead as global debt risks build #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Dimon, who runs JPMorgan Chase, the world's largest bank by market cap, said that today's growing mix of risks could combine in unpredictable ways.
